# tea-oss-todo

# Tea OSS To-Do List

This is a simple open-source To-Do List web application built using Flask.

## Features
- Add tasks
- Delete tasks
- Simple UI

## How to Run
1. Clone the repository:
   ```bash
   git clone <repository-url>
   cd tea-oss-todo
